languages.text: "Вероятность ошибочной деактивации составляет девяносто девять целых и девятьсот девяносто девять тысячных процента". {n}Экзальт-117 замирает на несколько мгновений, словно удивившись собственным словам.{/n} "Итог вероятностного исчисления содержит недопустимый процент погрешности. Обстоятельства деактивации идентификатора будут уточнены в процессе коммуникации".

"The probability of erroneous deactivation is 99.999 percent." {n}Exalt-117 goes still for a few moments, as if surprised by his own words.{/n} "The result of the probability calculation contains an unacceptable margin for error. The circumstances surrounding the deactivation of the identifier will be clarified during communication."
languages.original_text: "Вероятность ошибочной деактивации составляет девяносто девять целых и девятьсот девяносто девять тысячных процента". {n}Экзальт-117 замирает на несколько мгновений, словно удивившись собственным словам.{/n} "Итог вероятностного исчисления содержит недопустимый процент погрешности. Обстоятельства деактивации идентификатора будут уточнены в процессе коммуникации".

The circumstances surrounding the deactivation of the identifier will be clarified during communication."

languages.text: «La probabilidad de una desactivación errónea es del 99,999 por ciento». {n}Exaltado-117 guarda silencio durante unos momentos, como si le sorprendiera lo que acaba de decir.{/n} «El resultado del cálculo probabilístico contiene un margen de error inaceptable. Las circunstancias que rodean la desactivación del identificador deben aclararse mediante comunicación».
languages.original_text: "The probability of erroneous deactivation is 99.999 percent." {n}Exalt-117 goes still for a few moments, as if surprised by his own words.{/n} "The result of the probability calculation contains an unacceptable margin for error. The circumstances surrounding the deactivation of the identifier will be clarified during communication."

traits.locale_text: «La probabilidad de una desactivación errónea es del 99,999 por ciento». {n}Exaltado-117 guarda silencio durante unos momentos, como si le sorprendiera lo que acaba de decir.{/n} «El resultado del cálculo probabilístico contiene un margen de error inaceptable. Las circunstancias que rodean la desactivación del identificador deben aclararse mediante comunicación».

languages.text: “错误停用的概率为99.999%。”{n}尊使-117沉默片刻，仿佛被自己的话惊到了。{/n}“此概率的计算结果中存在不可接受的误差范围。关于标识符停用的具体情形，将在沟通过程中进行确认。”
languages.original_text: "The probability of erroneous deactivation is 99.999 percent." {n}Exalt-117 goes still for a few moments, as if surprised by his own words.{/n} "The result of the probability calculation contains an unacceptable margin for error. The circumstances surrounding the deactivation of the identifier will be clarified during communication."

traits.locale_text: “错误停用的概率为99.999%。”{n}尊使-117沉默片刻，仿佛被自己的话惊到了。{/n}“此概率的计算结果中存在不可接受的误差范围。关于标识符停用的具体情形，将在沟通过程中进行确认。”

languages.text: « La probabilité d'une désactivation par mégarde est de 99,999 pour cent. » {n}Exalt-117 se tait quelques instants, comme s'il était surpris par ses propres propos.{/n} « Le résultat du calcul de probabilité contient une marge d'erreur inacceptable. Les circonstances exactes de la désactivation de l'identifiant seront clarifiées au cours de l'entretien. »
languages.original_text: "The probability of erroneous deactivation is 99.999 percent." {n}Exalt-117 goes still for a few moments, as if surprised by his own words.{/n} "The result of the probability calculation contains an unacceptable margin for error. The circumstances surrounding the deactivation of the identifier will be clarified during communication."

traits.locale_text: « La probabilité d'une désactivation par mégarde est de 99,999 pour cent. » {n}Exalt-117 se tait quelques instants, comme s'il était surpris par ses propres propos.{/n} « Le résultat du calcul de probabilité contient une marge d'erreur inacceptable. Les circonstances exactes de la désactivation de l'identifiant seront clarifiées au cours de l'entretien. »

languages.text: "Hatalı devre dışı bırakma olasılığı yüzde 99,999." {n}Yüce-117, kendi sözlerine şaşırmış gibi birkaç saniyeliğine hareketsiz kalıyor.{/n} "Olasılık hesaplamasının sonucu, kabul edilemez bir hata payı içeriyor. Tanımlayıcının devre dışı bırakılmasını çevreleyen koşullar iletişim sırasında netleştirilecektir."
languages.original_text: "The probability of erroneous deactivation is 99.999 percent." {n}Exalt-117 goes still for a few moments, as if surprised by his own words.{/n} "The result of the probability calculation contains an unacceptable margin for error. The circumstances surrounding the deactivation of the identifier will be clarified during communication."

Tanımlayıcının devre dışı bırakılmasını çevreleyen koşullar iletişim sırasında netleştirilecektir."

languages.text: 「誤作動の確率は99.999%です」{n}エクサルト117は、自分の言葉に驚いたかのように数秒間動きを止めた。{/n}「確率計算の結果には許容できない誤差が含まれています。識別子の停止状況は通信中に明らかになります」
languages.original_text: "The probability of erroneous deactivation is 99.999 percent." {n}Exalt-117 goes still for a few moments, as if surprised by his own words.{/n} "The result of the probability calculation contains an unacceptable margin for error. The circumstances surrounding the deactivation of the identifier will be clarified during communication."

languages.text: "Die Wahrscheinlichkeit einer irrtümlichen Deaktivierung beträgt 99,999 Prozent." {n}Exalt-117 schweigt eine Weile, als hätten ihn seine eigenen Worte überrascht.{/n} "Das Ergebnis der Wahrscheinlichkeitsberechnung enthält einen inakzeptablen Spielraum für Fehler. Die Umstände der Deaktivierung des Identifikators werden während der Kommunikation geklärt."
